rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be expressed in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by placing AGREE contracts in valid scopes matching component type or implementation
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE expressions
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type contracts define assumptions and guarantees; implementation contracts define bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL event ports as numeric or Boolean values in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL property associations as AGREE variables
